Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Im given a DECLARE process model for a loan application process I need to add new constraints to prevent bias based on sensitive attributes like ApplicantAge ApplicantGender ApplicantRace The constraints should follow the DECLARE format with support and confidence values

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Let me think about what constraints would help mitigate bias

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Non succession constraints Prevent direct transitions from sensitive attribute events to decision events without proper checks Response constraints Ensure that after sensitive attribute checking certain mitigation activities must occur Coexistence constraints Ensure ManualReview exists when decisions are made for sensitive groups Chain succession constraints Enforce that decisions must be preceded by proper review steps

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: nonchainsuccession or nonsuccession From CheckApplicantRace to Reject prevent direct succession From CheckApplicantGender to Reject From CheckApplicantAge to Reject

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: response From CheckApplicantRace to ManualReview must respond with manual review From CheckApplicantGender to BiasMitigationCheck

Name: Deductive Reasoning - IND
Text: coexistence ManualReview and FinalDecision for sensitive applicants BiasMitigationCheck and Approve Minority or Reject Minority

Name: Deductive Reasoning - IND
Text: precedence ManualReview must precede FinalDecision when sensitive attributes are involved

Name: Deductive Reasoning - IND
Text: chainresponse After CheckApplicantRace must have BiasMitigationCheck before any decision

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Let me now create the updated dictionary with these constraints
